analysis: The project has multiple UI-related files including CSS, HTML, and TSX components. The theme should be updated to focus on black holes, with animated objects, slides, and pages. The current files include CSS for styling and TSX components for UI elements. The theme should incorporate cosmic and black hole visuals, animations, and a dark color palette.

improvements.description: Update the CSS file to include a dark, cosmic theme with black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Add animations for black hole formation, event horizons, and gravitational lensing effects.
Enhance the HTML content to include interactive black hole animations, animated slides about black holes, and a cosmic-themed navigation menu with a hamburger icon for mobile devices.

Implement JavaScript functions to control the animated slides and objects related to black holes. Add event listeners for smooth transitions and interactive elements such as hover effects on black hole visuals.

Update the TSX component to include a cosmic-themed UI with black hole animations and interactive elements. Use the Link import from 'wouter' for navigation and manage mobile menu state with useState hook.
Apply the same cosmic theme and black hole animations to the GitHub page styles to ensure consistency across all UI-related files.
Update the documentation styles to match the black hole theme with dark backgrounds, glowing text, and animated cosmic elements.
